name: Immo-Antares NV
summary: Immo-Antares NV issues real estate certificate under the name Antares. The company issues certificate that gives the right to a quota of the distributions and determined property deals income. Its real estate certificates are mainly offered to investors through a bid and are listed on the Brussels Euronext Regulated Market, as well as through private offers. The company is based in Brussels, Belgium. Immo-Antares NV is a subsidiary of KBC Bank NV.
